options.value: Please DO NOT share this article to non-STAFF Members as they will not have the permissions to view this article.

This article is part of Liferay's Customer Portal Knowledge fast-track publication program, which provides a huge library of solutions that Liferay engineers have created while supporting our customers. In order to provide the the knowledge you need the instant it becomes available, these articles may be presented in a raw and unedited form.

Important: Information about products not created by Liferay is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute Liferay Support recommendation nor endorsement. Liferay also does not assume any responsibility for any instructions herein or referenced regarding these products.

Important: According to Liferay Support's policy, our Support team will be limited in their ability to assist inquiries regarding custom development. Since Support is unable to examine custom code, and assist in the development of customizations, our team will instead focus their efforts on addressing any questions regarding Liferay API. If there are questions regarding the information discussed in this article and/or regarding Liferay API, feel free to open a ticket through our Support ticketing system.
This article is no longer actively maintained by Liferay. We continue to make it available because the information is still valuable, but some steps or details may vary due to product changes.

This article is undergoing regular review and revision. The details in the article may be out of date or incorrect due to recent updates. We apologize for any inconvenience and will be updating this article shortly.
